mapper.sql: id, from_job_id, from_job_name, to_job_id, to_job_name, transition_difficulty, avg_transition_time_months, required_skills_gap, similarity_score, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ai_career_plan.job_transition_paths WHERE from_job_id = #{fromJobId} ORDER BY similarity_score DESC
SELECT FROM ai_career_plan.job_transition_paths ORDER BY from_job_id, similarity_score DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_career_plan.job_transition_paths WHERE from_job_id = #{fromJobId}
